basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Assistant Project Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM) Or Graduate (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) +3 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM) Or Graduate (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) +3 years of relevant experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://iitk.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://iitk.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager posts is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM) or a Graduate degree (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) along with at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Project Manager post in this recruitment drive by IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment is entirely offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Project Manager position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 21,000 to Rs. 53,400.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Project Manager role at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIT Kanpur, which is https://iitk.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./IP/DOAD/2026/27.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Project Manager position is contractual.
